title: Quran, Sura 2: Al-Baqara
description: Sura 2 (Al-Baqara: The Cow (Opening)) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 2 (Al-Baqara: The Cow (Opening)) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: This is the Book in which there is no doubt, a guidance for those who are conscious of God — who believe in the unseen, establish prayer, and spend out of what We have provided for them; and who believe in what has been revealed to you and what was revealed before you, and who are certain of the Hereafter.
